spec.name: Soul Trigger Sphere
spec.summary: arms soul energy in a spherical envelope by creating a fresh flux expression
spec.effect_description: The caster inscribes a sigil that arms soul energy in a spherical envelope by creating a fresh flux expression. Effect range: medium. Persistence: permanent.
